title: Struggle: The Life and Lost Art of Szukalski
original_title: Struggle: The Life and Lost Art of Szukalski
overview: Artists in LA discover the work of forgotten Polish sculptor Stanislav Szukalski, a mad genius whose true story unfolds chapter by astounding chapter.
